title: Senior Software Engineer - SAP India Capital India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - SAP India Capital India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
SAP India Capital India has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About SAP India Capital India:
SAP India Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAP India Capital India!
jsonLd.skills: Python, Java, REST APIs, CI/CD, Microservices, Go, Agile/Scrum, Node.js
